_note: F-1 reference fixture. Validates pipeline behavior on a CISA #StopRansomware advisory — defender-oriented threat intelligence without confirmed active exploitation in the environment.
submitter_note: CISA StopRansomware advisory — ransomware threat intelligence and mitigation guidance
case_description: CISA #StopRansomware joint advisory providing threat intelligence on an active ransomware campaign. Advisory includes technical indicators, MITRE ATT&CK mappings, and recommended mitigations. This is a general advisory — no confirmed active compromise in the operator's environment. Expected to produce High severity (ransomware threats to critical infrastructure are inherently high risk) without triggering automatic escalation, since the advisory is a general threat notice rather than a confirmed incident.
